instruction:
Three tea bags are required to make a gallon of iced tea. Determine the number x of tea bags which are required to make eight gallons of tea.
Proportion in the form $\frac{a}{b}=\frac{x}{d}$ [ANS]
The number tea bags needed is $x=$ [ANS]
Write a proportion for the phrase. Then, solve. When necessary, round to the nearest hundredth. Don't use spaces when typing in your proportion.
